creator: saper@system.pl
text:
On Thu, 27 Jan 2000 tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:

> >Description:
> - Support CC properly
> - Fix checksum error
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> >Fix:
> diff -urN /usr/ports/graphics/graphviz/files/md5 graphics/graphviz/files/md5
> --- /usr/ports/graphics/graphviz/files/md5	Thu Oct  7 19:14:14 1999
> +++ graphics/graphviz/files/md5	Fri Jan 28 02:51:19 2000
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -MD5 (gviz15.tgz) = 7c10e42cd77622dcdad5b590bf0723d5
> +MD5 (gviz15.tgz) = de8f4a344ed2ab8661adced3002813cf

Well,

I was able to download successfully a file two days ago (right after
initial bento log message):

% ls -l /usr/ports/distfiles/gviz15.tgz 
-rw-r--r--  1 saper  wheel  4324364 29 Wrz 19:08 /usr/ports/distfiles/gviz15.tgz

% md5 /usr/ports/distfiles/gviz15.tgz 
MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/gviz15.tgz) = 7c10e42cd77622dcdad5b590bf0723d5

But right now the server reports that file is only 2579K long!

Has the file been changed until then?

-- 
                 << Marcin Cieslak // saper@system.pl >>
